purpose: Lightweight retrieval index for KIT framework explanations and brainstorm routing.

entries.use_when: User wants to build direct model/API functionality inside an app, CLI, workflow, or skill.
User needs multi-agent orchestration, state, staged execution, or proof/verification governance.
User is building a frontend/backend software product that benefits from formal spec-driven change management.
User needs governed AI coding delivery for frontend/backend apps, quality gates, UI runtime proof, or release readiness.
User has an existing codebase/software and wants agents to operate it through a reliable CLI instead of UI automation.
User needs a low-friction text-first framework rather than a full runtime or formal spec tool.
User needs logged-in browser automation, delivery, publishing, or platform operation evidence.
User is unclear about the product form and needs PM-style discovery before technical selection.
KIT needs compact reusable questions for existing-project status, archive decisions, object classification, framework routing, browser/image/live action, or hardcoded assumptions.
